allow: Bash(npx supabase db query "SELECT name, hero_badge, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM kudos WHERE receiver_id = user_profiles.id\) as kudos_received FROM user_profiles WHERE hero_badge IS NOT NULL ORDER BY kudos_received DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54322 -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT name, hero_badge, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM kudos WHERE receiver_id = user_profiles.id\) as kudos_received FROM user_profiles WHERE hero_badge IS NOT NULL ORDER BY kudos_received DESC LIMIT 10;")
